title: The Truth Behind Pluto's Size!

scenes.text: Pluto is no longer considered a planet.
Many believe Pluto was unfairly demoted.
scenes.label: Pluto's Demotion Was Unjust

scenes.text: Pluto is classified as a dwarf planet due to its size and orbit.
scenes.label: Dwarf Planet Classification

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Explore why Pluto's classification changed and its real status today. Follow for daily science!
